description: Range elements are filtering syntax used after the 'range' keyword in FLAC commands. They select subsets of model objects based on geometric regions, attributes, or logical conditions.

examples: structure node fix velocity range cylinder end-1 0 0 0 end-2 0 0 10 radius 5
notes: Multiple range elements create intersection (AND) by default
Unspecified range affects all objects of target type

common_patterns.name: Cylindrical structural-node range

common_patterns.name: Named range reuse
common_patterns.example:
model range create 'core' cylinder end-1 0 0 0 end-2 0 0 10 radius 3
zone property density 2500 range named-range 'core'

notes: Multiple range elements create intersection (AND) by default
Unspecified range affects all objects of target type
